page: Microsoft Azure E4ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The processor operates at a base frequency of 3.7 GHz and is equipped with 32 MB of L3 cache. The system is provisioned with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Local storage is bundled, providing 236 GB of capacity with Premium Storage capability, while there are no integrated GPUs.

Performance benchmarks demonstrate strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance ranking in the top tier and the Geekbench single-core score placing in the top 25%. However, multi-core scaling is more moderate, with stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core scores falling into the average category. Memory subsystem performance shows a notable bottleneck, with read-only memory bandwidth for both small and large blocks registering in the bottom 25%, though write bandwidth remains average.

Given the high memory density relative to the vCPU count, this instance type offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial memory footprints without demanding massive parallel compute scaling. It is well-suited for memory-intensive applications such as caching layers, Redis deployments, and moderate web serving. Conversely, it is less optimal for heavy database operations or software compilation, where benchmarks indicated weaker performance.
description: The Microsoft Azure E4ads_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine powered by a 3.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9V74 processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM. This configuration yields a high 8.0 GB of memory per vCPU, supported by 236 GB of local storage. Benchmarks show top-tier single-core CPU performance, though multi-core scaling and read-only memory bandwidth are more moderate. The instance is highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads such as caching, in-memory databases, and web serving, where its high resource density provides strong qualitative cost efficiency. However, it exhibits weaker performance in database operations and software compilation.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E4ads_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and 236 GB of local storage, delivering strong single-core performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E4ads_v6 is a memory-optimized VM with 4 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 236 GB local storage, built for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, high memory density, and local storage for caching and web serving workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 3.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9V74 processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs
Equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a high 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio
Includes 236 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Delivers top-tier single-core CPU performance in benchmark testing
Best suited for in-memory caching, Redis, and moderate web serving
